root_cause: Executable bundle lifecycle was certified, but domain bundle identity resolution was still embedded in Marketing-specific runtime constants.
runtime_model: DOMAIN_BUNDLE_REGISTRY runtime with canonical registry construction.
Registry lookup validation for MARKETING, SERVER_MANAGEMENT, TRADING, and HEALTHCARE.
Registry hash and registry entry hash continuity.
Fail-closed behavior for unknown, duplicate, hash-mismatched, or non-executable entries.
Marketing executable bundle id validation consults the registry while preserving existing artifact creation behavior.
replay_impact: Domain bundle identity resolution is now replay-visible.
Failed resolution remains deterministic and replay-valid.
No generic domain factory filesystem creation is introduced.
runtime_continuity_note: AIGOL_GENERIC_DOMAIN_FACTORY_RUNTIME_V1 realizes executable placeholder generation for all four registry domains while preserving registry hash and entry hash validation.
non_goals_preserved: No overwrite, delete, rename, move, or deployment authority.
